scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @hunvreus/heypi run build && pnpm --filter "./packages/heypi-runtime-*" run build:package && pnpm --filter create-heypi run build
scripts.dev:slack: cd examples/slack-devops && tsx watch --conditions development index.ts
scripts.dev:discord: cd examples/discord-gondolin && tsx watch --conditions development index.ts
scripts.dev:telegram: cd examples/telegram-workout && tsx watch --conditions development index.ts
scripts.dev:telegram:cofounder: cd examples/telegram-cofounder && tsx watch --conditions development index.ts
scripts.dev:webhook: cd examples/webhook-github-docker && tsx watch --conditions development index.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hunvreus/heypi run typecheck && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter "./packages/heypi-runtime-*" run check && pnpm --filter create-heypi run check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @hunvreus/heypi run test && pnpm --filter "./packages/heypi-runtime-*" run test && pnpm --filter create-heypi run test && pnpm run test:telegram:cofounder
